name: ICYMI News
subject: Defending the Constitution
body:
I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as d
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgaamsc62cr3juge9lauogjkvtnockatd73jj8ro_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1gm9oj2c5h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqitcjqlskejeos27eo63rksvg30v9eppnsqdqao_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1gm9oj2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated. It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges? Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given us the guide: The Federalist Papers. These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described **[The Federalist Papers](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zii33ibfinjveecs2ttsvcpal73rchlkco4l3rjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1gm9oj2c5h2bs)** as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to give you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale’s free online course,**[“The Federalist Papers,”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs2qvm9nif6k6m2tbipor0qrscc1gcoqncvem0k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1gm9oj2c5h2bs)** today. Taught by Hillsdale College’s politics faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the nature of the three branches of government, and the argument concerning the Bill of Rights. Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll activate your free enrollment in **[“The Federalist Papers”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zblnekgqc8738l75irk6lkclqlkv6aen9jn01mt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1gm9oj2c5h2bs)** today. [Activate your free course now »](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrq9oi9j53sfd0tqt7so95bb3oc1v64kq37fsnrg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1gm9oj2c5h2bs) Warm regards,Kyle Murnen, ’09Director of Online LearningHillsdale College
* * *

## What students are saying
"Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life." **\- Fred D.** "Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge." **\- John C.** [Activate your free course now »](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zflu5vspta8t8084pvk7cfd49dkj6a1d75fglj30_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1gm9oj2c5h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

But first, let me tell you why this matters so much:

My opponent is using his vast personal fortune to outraise us. He’s writing his campaign million dollar check after million dollar check.

In fact, Youngkin is so obsessed with buying the Virginia governor’s office that he’s promising to spend up to $75 million of his own money to do it.

He’s only getting started, Derek, and I need our historic grassroots team to be ready for whatever happens next. Virginians and Democrats across the country are counting on us to stop him and Donald Trump.

_**[That is exactly why tonight’s deadline matters so much. So right now, I’m humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign. body:
Politicians and radical activists have declared war on your privacy. They keep finding new ways to convince Big Government to
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ofip4epag698fg7bgh6h95hjs8dn50u7539h88_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1im8o32cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onm6lrm0s74sjhrep31ekr7ecjnc2obedbic6r72cjm6gr3cdhjchij8splmcon0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cj66hibbc77mph6cc9gm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg4iok86o8qsruk0rcann5r5kv11idsieo88vl50_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1im8o32cdh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

**Politicians and radical activists have declared war on your privacy. **

They keep finding new ways to convince Big Government to track your private information so they can target you for your beliefs.

Radical activists use public records to target conservative donors online for contributing to causes they disagree with. Even elected officials have been caught in the act.

* **_Rep. Joaquin Castro (D-TX) tweeted the names and employers of his own constituents who donated to President Trump 's re-election campaign as a way to publicly shame these individuals._**

People United for Privacy Foundation is fighting to end these attacks by protecting your privacy.

_People United for Privacy Foundation works to protect the rights of individuals to come together in support of their shared values_. We believe every American has the right to support causes they believe in without fear of harassment and intimidation.

[**Friend, People United for Privacy Foundation was created to protect citizen privacy. Please support our mission today by donating $35, $50, or even $100. Click here to donate >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2nuvcbr3qfrscgjo13alg5a10uvpdvgkmici83g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1im8o32cdh2bs)

**Recently, PUFPF was involved in a BIG WIN for citizen privacy. **

California was demanding that non-profit organizations disclose their donors, paving the way for radical activists to take their online attacks offline and destroy people's lives. **Fortunately, the Supreme Court shut down California 's attempt to expose non-profit supporters. **

But that hasn't stopped radical activists and politicians from finding other ways to access our private information.

They will keep trying to find new ways to gain access to private information about our political and personal beliefs so they can continue their campaign of harassment and intimidation.

PUFPF is fighting to ensure that our private information stays out of the hands of the government and radical activists.

Can I count on your support? Your donation helps us protect our First Amendment right to privately support the causes we believe in.

People United for Privacy Foundation is completely supported by individuals who care about our right to privacy. You can rest assured that your donations to the People United for Privacy Foundation will be private and protected from government scrutiny.

**Your support is critical to our success. Please select an amount below to donate today. **

[**Donate $5 >>
Donate $10 >>
Donate $25 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $250 >>
Donate $500 >>
Donate $1,000 >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgnkd2gslkp7adncoag99c48k13gamh58c6sv3t0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1im8o32cdh2bs)

Thank you for your support,

Heather Lauer
Executive Director
People United for Privacy Foundation

body:

**[URGENT: Former President Bush alludes that Trump supporters are bigger terrorists than those from foreign countries that hate America](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=751accf7dfb26b1cb9e4f4da84ef86972bdc4f4f589bb212f7a509b3daf45255d0760a563623a1362b77824cedc19d348db00e48e1738c54) **
Friend,

Our Country is far more susceptible to attack by outside terrorist groups than ever before.

While the future of America is being threatened, former President Bush, _who is responsible for getting us into the quicksand of the Middle East (and then not winning!)_ , lectures us that**_ terrorists on the "right" are a bigger problem than those from foreign countries that hate America._**

If that is so, why was he willing to spend trillions of dollars and be responsible for the death of perhaps millions of people? He shouldn't be lecturing us about anything. **The World Trade Center came down during his watch. **Bush led a failed and uninspiring presidency. Period.

Just nine months ago, the United States was viewed as being strong, and now we are being viewed as weak and stupid. I know this is all Joe Biden's fault, but I want to know what YOU think about it all, Friend.

Your answers will represent the views of every American in your area.

_**[Please take this CONFIDENTIAL Survey IMMEDIATELY so I can review your response.>>](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=751accf7dfb26b1cb9e4f4da84ef86972bdc4f4f589bb212f7a509b3daf45255d0760a563623a1362b77824cedc19d348db00e48e1738c54)**_ **[TRUMP CONFIDENTIAL SURVEY](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=751accf7dfb26b1cb9e4f4da84ef86972bdc4f4f589bb212f7a509b3daf45255d0760a563623a1362b77824cedc19d348db00e48e1738c54)** **Do you agree****F****OREIGN TERRORISTS are a greater threat to this country than American Patriots** **?**

**[O YES](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=751accf7dfb26b1cb9e4f4da84ef86972bdc4f4f589bb212f7a509b3daf45255d0760a563623a1362b77824cedc19d348db00e48e1738c54)

[O NO](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=751accf7dfb26b1cb9e4f4da84ef86972bdc4f4f589bb212f7a509b3daf45255d0760a563623a1362b77824cedc19d348db00e48e1738c54)**

[TAKE THE SURVEY NOW >>](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=751accf7dfb26b1cb9e4f4da84ef86972bdc4f4f589bb212f7a509b3daf45255d0760a563623a1362b77824cedc19d348db00e48e1738c54)
**The truth is, we are no longer respected after the pathetic and incompetent withdrawal from Afghanistan.** It will be a long time before we gain our reputation back.

This loss emboldens not only foreign terrorists, but also Antifa and BLM. It's sad that this is not what you hear from the Fake News Media who are only interested in talking about "terrorism" from the right and protecting an illegitimate president.

Our reputation is gone, our Borders are broken, inflation is raging, and COVID continues, even with the vaccines (developed under your favorite President), to ravage our Nation.

I really want to know what YOU think about all of this, Friend. I'll look for your response in 1 HOUR.
_**[Please take my CONFIDENTIAL Survey IMMEDIATELY to tell me what you think.](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=751accf7dfb26b1cb9e4f4da84ef86972bdc4f4f589bb212f7a509b3daf45255d0760a563623a1362b77824cedc19d348db00e48e1738c54)**_

clean_body: You need to read this. | | | | | | | Friend, Our Country is far more susceptible to attack by outside terrorist groups than ever before. While the future of America is being threatened, former President Bush, who is responsible for getting us into the quicksand of the Middle East (and then not winning!) , lectures us that terrorists on the "right" are a bigger problem than those from foreign countries that hate America. If that is so, why was he willing to spend trillions of dollars and be responsible for the death of perhaps millions of people? He shouldn't be lecturing us about anything. The World Trade Center came down during his watch. Bush led a failed and uninspiring presidency. Period. Just nine months ago, the United States was viewed as being strong, and now we are being viewed as weak and stupid. I know this is all Joe Biden's fault, but I want to know what YOU think about it all, Friend. Your answers will represent the views of every American in your area. Do you agreeFOREIGN TERRORISTS are a greater threat to this country than American Patriots ? The truth is, we are no longer respected after the pathetic and incompetent withdrawal from Afghanistan. It will be a long time before we gain our reputation back. This loss emboldens not only foreign terrorists, but also Antifa and BLM. It's sad that this is not what you hear from the Fake News Media who are only interested in talking about "terrorism" from the right and protecting an illegitimate president. Our reputation is gone, our Borders are broken, inflation is raging, and COVID continues, even with the vaccines (developed under your favorite President), to ravage our Nation. I really want to know what YOU think about all of this, Friend. I'll look for your response in 1 HOUR. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | | Contributions to Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee on behalf of Save America and the Make America Great Again PAC.

clean_body: I'm running for governor because we have too many gunshots fired, not enough vaccination shots given and too few shots for our young people to reach their full potential. | | You’re receiving this email because you have supported exciting Democratic changemakers in the past. JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running for governor to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. JB would love to have your support, but if you would rather not hear from us you can at any time. I'm running for governor because we have too many gunshots fired, not enough vaccination shots given and too few shots for our young people to reach their full potential. The change we seek requires everyone playing their part. So today I’m asking you to share your priorities with me so that I better hear your voice and carry it with me. I know these are tough times. While COVID-19 continues to impact our communities, Republicans in Tennessee refuse mask mandates and downplay the realities of the Delta variant. While Tennessee families struggle to make rent or pay healthcare bills, Republican leadership across the state prioritized culture wars, attacked student athletes, declared an outright assault on our voting process, and refused to take the necessary steps to protect our children and educators who are going back into the classroom. But when I talk to folks across the state, I’m hearing concerns about housing, clean water, economic opportunity, access to affordable education, and so much more. Tennesseans want leaders who listen and care about the issues impacting them directly – not more partisan warfare. If you have additional concerns, or have thoughts on an issue not listed in the survey, do not hesitate to reply directly to this email. I look forward to reading your response. JB Smiley, Jr. Candidate for Governor of Tennessee Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. name: Ellie Warner
subject: Don’t let Glenn Youngkin buy Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36036334/306926964/-2023814932?refcode=20210919.2_EW_9DR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQwNjJhZi00ZDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_YAKuSIIF8KDW3QoWpzjEj4g6DTmu4GRYPiPi-hhDNc=)

| | Hey Derek, I’ll make this brief —

The thing is, we’re only about 50% of the way toward our $300,000 Early Vote kickoff goal.

I know it's ambitious, but after finding out that Glenn Youngkin loaned his campaign $4.5 million from his personal fortune, I really thought folks would jump at the chance to catch up.

_I have to admit, I’m stunned that so few members of our team are donating right now. We can’t let Glenn Youngkin buy the Virginia Governor’s office._

_**[I’m sending you this update because I know I can count on you — will you chip in any amount right now to help us get back on track toward our goal? Hey there, I wish I had better news for you, but with just hours before our midnight goal, it looks like we’re going to fall short again. We’ve missed our online fundraising goals every day this month -- and **with top Republicans laser-focused on this race, falling short of another milestone could spell big trouble for our Senate majority.** It had already been a slow couple of weeks, but in the past few days our grassroots donations slowed to a crawl. Any slip in our numbers is concerning, but with our big FEC deadline just around the corner, any signs of weakness will put an even bigger target on our backs. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the Senate -- and New Hampshire is his number one target. We can’t match the war chests and mega-bucks the GOP is spending against us, but we need supporters like you to show the strength of our campaign. **That’s why I need your help before midnight, folks.[Rush $5 or whatever you can to keep New Hampshire blue -- any amount makes a difference in a race this close.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36037919/306933422/-149339129?refcode=e20210919_mp-wkd-goal-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2NlOWNjNC01MjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eNrwIOIZaOZz3LtbQ-3-3zpXmdo5iV7NgCs0_9VI-EE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36037920/306933423/-149339129?refcode=e20210919_mp-wkd-goal-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2NlOWNjNC01MjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eNrwIOIZaOZz3LtbQ-3-3zpXmdo5iV7NgCs0_9VI-EE=)

name: Derek Marshall
subject: We need a pro-choice champion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

There’s a reason why we’re trying to flip California’s 8th district from red to blue. **Incumbent Jay Obernolte falls in line with the most extreme faction of Republicans.** He’s voted against certifying the presidential election results. He voted not to investigate the January 6th attacks on the U.S. Capitol. And he voted against impeaching Donald Trump, no matter his increasingly authoritarian actions.

**It’s simple: Obernolte has got to go.[He represents the worst parts of the Republican Party and we cannot allow him to continue holding this Congressional seat. Will you donate today to support my candidacy against this Trump supporter?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36043286/306954155/598768651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjFlM2FhNC02MjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0PTL2UB-hg0BsOyiSr35ytpSdk_yusmTm2hQniUbUg=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36043287/306954168/-1784513525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjFlM2FhNC02MjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0PTL2UB-hg0BsOyiSr35ytpSdk_yusmTm2hQniUbUg=)
And there’s something else: Jay Obernolte consistently votes against womens’ rights and reproductive freedoms. **He voted against paycheck fairness for women in the workplace, and voted against authorizing the Violence Against Women Act**. His record is shameful.

**In July, he was awarded a 100% pro-life rating from the ProLife Council PAC, who also endorsed him.** Many people seek abortions for many different reasons, and with the recent severe attacks on abortion rights across the country, we have to double down on our commitment to pro-choice policies.

Obernolte doesn’t believe in peoples’ right to their own bodily autonomy when it comes to reproductive decisions. But I do. **I have always stood proudly pro-choice, because I know that abortions are a crucial part of healthcare and reproductive freedom.** I will never waver on an issue so important.

**[That’s one of the reasons why I’m asking you to extend your support to my campaign. Extremists like Obernolte have no place in Congress, and I need your help to replace him.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36043288/306954183/598768651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjFlM2FhNC02MjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0PTL2UB-hg0BsOyiSr35ytpSdk_yusmTm2hQniUbUg=)**

clean_body: Peter, There’s a reason why we’re trying to flip California’s 8th district from red to blue. Incumbent Jay Obernolte falls in line with the most extreme faction of Republicans. He’s voted against certifying the presidential election results. He voted not to investigate the January 6th attacks on the U.S. Capitol. And he voted against impeaching Donald Trump, no matter his increasingly authoritarian actions. It’s simple: Obernolte has got to go.= = And there’s something else: Jay Obernolte consistently votes against womens’ rights and reproductive freedoms. He voted against paycheck fairness for women in the workplace, and voted against authorizing the Violence Against Women Act. His record is shameful. In July, he was awarded a 100% pro-life rating from the ProLife Council PAC, who also endorsed him. Many people seek abortions for many different reasons, and with the recent severe attacks on abortion rights across the country, we have to double down on our commitment to pro-choice policies. Obernolte doesn’t believe in peoples’ right to their own bodily autonomy when it comes to reproductive decisions. But I do. I have always stood proudly pro-choice, because I know that abortions are a crucial part of healthcare and reproductive freedom. I will never waver on an issue so important. = Are you with me? In Solidarity, Derek Marshall * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Hey friend, can I give you a call?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I hope I can give you a ring soon
#

Hey friend. Can I give you a phone call?
We only have a couple of weeks until we are federally mandated to report our fundraising numbers.
That means we have a lot of work to do to hit our goal for the month, and not a lot of time to do it.
It's going to take all of us doing our part for us to reach our goal and post big numbers that will reflect the strength of our big, diverse coalition.
Now, I’m about to ask you to make a donation to our campaign to make government work for working people, but the least I can do is call a few folks to say thank you for chipping in.
**So I'm asking: Could you please make your first donation to help us build a government that gives working people a seat at the table? You might just get a call from me to say thank you for your support.**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36043461/306954952/-353695395?refcode2=fd1e3aa4-6219-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210919-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFlM2FhNC02MjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQWYHgzcpNuZR-Hx8CsvjzA6A0YZxG6n7g42LCmlbdQ=)**
Having come from a poor, working family myself, I know what a big decision it is to donate to a cause you care about. I know what it’s like to make tough decisions about where your hard-earned money goes.
That’s why it means so much that you chose to be a part of the movement we’re building for working folks like you and me.
So I set aside some time this month and asked my team to select a handful of folks who contribute through this email for my partner Dr. Matt and me to call.
**We’d love the chance to hear what’s on your mind and thank you personally for joining our fight for working people. So what do you say?**
**[Could you make your first donation to our campaign now for a chance to be one of the grassroots donors Dr. Matt and I call?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36043462/306954953/-353695395?refcode2=fd1e3aa4-6219-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210919-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFlM2FhNC02MjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQWYHgzcpNuZR-Hx8CsvjzA6A0YZxG6n7g42LCmlbdQ=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36043463/306954954/-353695395?refcode2=fd1e3aa4-6219-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210919-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFlM2FhNC02MjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQWYHgzcpNuZR-Hx8CsvjzA6A0YZxG6n7g42LCmlbdQ=)**
I hope I can give you a ring soon. Thanks for everything you do to support our campaign.
Best,
Malcolm

name: Mark Takano
subject: I’m scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:

clean_body: please read this | | | Derek, Senate control hinges on my race in Nevada – and I wish I was dropping into your inbox with better news: 1. I'm being massively outspent by GOP outside groups: They have already poured over $1 million into Nevada to defeat me. 2. The Cook Political Report just downgraded my chances of winning – just as CNN is calling Nevada a top pickup opportunity for Republicans. 3. As of 9 a.m., I’m still $6,978 behind my midnight fundraising goal. And I urgently need your help to make up the gap before midnight, friend. Falling short of my goal tonight means making some difficult decisions that could cost me this race and could cost Democrats the Senate. I'm running out of time – and Mitch McConnell's allies are going all in to defeat me. I've got nowhere else to turn, so I'm asking: Can I count on you, Derek? Together, I know we can protect this seat and our Senate majority. Thank you for being on my team. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . subject: Can you believe what Glenn Beck said about Tina?
body:
We need you to hear it. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=1af6178922&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| | Friend, Tina sat down with Glenn Beck, the American Conservative radio and tv host, and discussed her background, what’s going on in Afghanistan, our National Security, and the failures of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Abigail Spanberger, and the rest of the Democrats.

Thankfully, these two _**proud Conservatives**_ know what America needs. Especially Glenn, who said:
“I want you to do your homework on her...she is somebody who has worked tirelessly to save human lives.”

“Please find her and, if you can, support her.”

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The GOP can’t win when everyone votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your first contribution to our campaign before our end-of-quarter deadline. Your support can, and will, have an important impact on the 2022 midterms. But first I want to explain why it’s so crucial: This week, we defeated the Republican-led recall in California by a wide margin. The Republican recall was always nothing but a power grab by the GOP. And it backfired. It showcased the lack of support for Republican values and propaganda. The results sent a clear message that the GOP’s voter suppression and anti-science rhetoric has no place in the Golden State. Now, we need to utilize the lessons learned from California and apply it to the upcoming midterm races across the country. The vast majority of voters across the country support our agenda – they believe in an economy that works for everyone, investments in our people and the country’s infrastructure, reproductive rights, climate action, affordable healthcare, voting protections, and Congressional action to achieve these objectives. It’s exactly why the GOP is determined to enact voter suppression laws across the country. They know our agenda is popular among the people, and they can’t win in elections where everyone is able to vote. So they are doing everything they can to suppress votes wherever they can. And that means we have to work that much harder to defeat them. Next week, we’ll reach our deadline for the FEC fundraising quarter. When it’s over, we’ll report not only how much we’ve raised, but how many people have contributed to our campaign to defend and expand our Democratic majorities. **And because Republicans have made me such a target, they’ll be paying extra close attention to our fundraising numbers especially.** **This is a chance to send a warning sign to Republicans from California to Mar-a-Lago: if you spread lies and try to subvert our democracy, you will never succeed.** **[With the FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline next week, can you pitch in $3 or $15 to support my work defending our Democratic majorities? Any amount you can give makes a big difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36049251/306963191/581033598?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_ND_20210919_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWY5MTUyZi02YTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zqYVJ3a6sLs9jCEBJon5IUa4HPUZ_A6ja4AlZr4Cyl4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36049259/306963198/581033598?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_ND_20210919_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWY5MTUyZi02YTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zqYVJ3a6sLs9jCEBJon5IUa4HPUZ_A6ja4AlZr4Cyl4=)

Thank you for being a valued member of my team.
— Adam

subject: My nut allergy

body:
Have I told you about my nut allergy? Almonds, pecans, walnuts, and hazelnuts are no-can-do for me. Cashews are magically okay, and peanuts are fine because they are legumes(!). I’m also allergic to fish, despite the fact that my mom used to regularly make me tuna sandwiches growing up. She would serve it with a cup of hot tea because my throat would hurt.* (I really liked tuna fish sandwiches back then!) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36049796/306965509/-847830491?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210919allergies_EG_non_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRlZDAyYy02YjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zezyASepuNL49-nUwzDoWac_Coj4jk1lPZM3Vmo4xMo=)

Hey friends, Have I told you about my nut allergy? Almonds, pecans, walnuts, and hazelnuts are no-can-do for me. Cashews are magically okay, and peanuts are fine because they are legumes(!). I’m also allergic to fish, despite the fact that my mom used to _regularly_ make me tuna sandwiches growing up.1 Why am I telling you any of this? (It’s not just for sympathy.) I’m telling you because** pharmaceutical companies charge astronomical prices for medication that _literally_ could be the difference between going to the Emergency Room for a severe, possibly life-threatening allergic reaction and a scary-but-ultimately-okay-and-you’ll-laugh-about-it-later night out with friends.** It’s preposterous, and we’ve got to force Big Pharma to stop price-gouging medications like epinephrine and insulin — that’s a fight I am _very eager_ to take on, to put it very mildly. [_**Chip in now to help send me to Congress so I can fight back against Big Pharma for all the kids like me with severe nut allergies.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36049798/306965511/-847830491?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210919allergies_EG_non_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRlZDAyYy02YjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zezyASepuNL49-nUwzDoWac_Coj4jk1lPZM3Vmo4xMo=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

I have carried around an epi-pen since my youth, and while I have luckily never needed to use it,2 I am shocked every time I refill my prescription.
Back in 2016, a two pack of epi-pens — which administers a dose of epinephrine that prevents people from going into severe (again, life-threatening) anaphylactic shock — cost $700.
Seven. HUNDRED. Dollars.
To make matters worse, in 2007 the _exact same device_ with the _exact same dosage_ cost. . . $94. That’s an almost 750% increase over 9 years.
You might be thinking to yourself, “Huh, that’s weird. I wonder why that happened.” Well I’ll tell you why it happened: a Big Pharma corporation called Mylan bought up the entire epi-pen market. With no competition, they greedily jacked prices up with no government accountability.
There was such an outcry at this price spike that Mylan was forced to recalibrate and come out with generic versions (yay!), but today a two-pack of epi-pens costs more than $300 (no!). That is still far beyond the reach of so many parents who just want to protect their kids from things like bee stings3 that kids encounter constantly.
**I, for one, am fed up with it.[_Make a contribution now so I can go to Washington, hold Big Pharma accountable, and prevent them from pricing medications like insulin and epinephrine (that’s just the beginning of the list) out of affordability from millions of Americans who need them._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36049814/306965527/-847830491?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210919allergies_EG_non_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRlZDAyYy02YjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zezyASepuNL49-nUwzDoWac_Coj4jk1lPZM3Vmo4xMo=)**

Eddie

1: My mom was not in the wrong here. I insisted on these sandwiches. However, I have a long list of friends and family who have (supposedly accidentally) poisoned me. I forgive them. Mostly.
2: I did once accidentally stab myself with an epi-pen in a moment of distress. 0/10. Would not recommend.
3: Or foods! I can’t tell you how many times I’ve eaten a cookie that I thought was safe, only to find out it sneakily had nuts. And I am supposedly much savvier than a child. So, please don’t be offended if you offer me a cookie and I refuse. It could have been manufactured alongside a tree nut!

clean_body: Have I told you about my nut allergy? Almonds, pecans, walnuts, and hazelnuts are no-can-do for me. Cashews are magically okay, and peanuts are fine because they are legumes(!). I’m also allergic to fish, despite the fact that my mom used to regularly make me tuna sandwiches growing up. She would serve it with a cup of hot tea because my throat would hurt. (I really liked tuna fish sandwiches back then!) | = Hey friends, Have I told you about my nut allergy? Almonds, pecans, walnuts, and hazelnuts are no-can-do for me. Cashews are magically okay, and peanuts are fine because they are legumes(!). I’m also allergic to fish, despite the fact that my mom used to regularly make me tuna sandwiches growing up.1 Why am I telling you any of this? (It’s not just for sympathy.) I’m telling you because pharmaceutical companies charge astronomical prices for medication that literally could be the difference between going to the Emergency Room for a severe, possibly life-threatening allergic reaction and a scary-but-ultimately-okay-and-you’ll-laugh-about-it-later night out with friends. It’s preposterous, and we’ve got to force Big Pharma to stop price-gouging medications like epinephrine and insulin — that’s a fight I am very eager to take on, to put it very mildly. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = I have carried around an epi-pen since my youth, and while I have luckily never needed to use it,2 I am shocked every time I refill my prescription. Back in 2016, a two pack of epi-pens — which administers a dose of epinephrine that prevents people from going into severe (again, life-threatening) anaphylactic shock — cost $700. Seven. HUNDRED. Dollars. To make matters worse, in 2007 the exact same device with the exact same dosage cost. . . $94. That’s an almost 750% increase over 9 years. You might be thinking to yourself, “Huh, that’s weird. I wonder why that happened.” Well I’ll tell you why it happened: a Big Pharma corporation called Mylan bought up the entire epi-pen market. With no competition, they greedily jacked prices up with no government accountability. There was such an outcry at this price spike that Mylan was forced to recalibrate and come out with generic versions (yay!), but today a two-pack of epi-pens costs more than $300 (no!). That is still far beyond the reach of so many parents who just want to protect their kids from things like bee stings3 that kids encounter constantly. I, for one, am fed up with it.= ** = Thanks for reading. Eddie 1: My mom was not in the wrong here. I insisted on these sandwiches. However, I have a long list of friends and family who have (supposedly accidentally) poisoned me. I forgive them. Mostly. 2: I did once accidentally stab myself with an epi-pen in a moment of distress. 0/10. Would not recommend. 3: Or foods! I can’t tell you how many times I’ve eaten a cookie that I thought was safe, only to find out it sneakily had nuts. And I am supposedly much savvier than a child. So, please don’t be offended if you offer me a cookie and I refuse. It could have been manufactured alongside a tree nut! | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. Chip in now to help Eddie's campaign flip FL-15 blue! | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Box 1111 11507 Dr Martin Luther King Jr Blvd Mango, FL 33550-9700 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: We must honor Justice Ginsburg’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It’s hard to believe that this weekend marks a year since we lost Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.
#

It’s hard to believe that this weekend marks a year since we lost Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, a giant in American history.
She was a champion for equality and justice. She worked tirelessly to create and defend legal frameworks that advanced women’s rights, reproductive freedom, voting rights and more.
She left behind a remarkable legacy that continues to inspire, and I will never forget the privilege I had to meet her while she was with us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36050067/306966423/1741212721?refcode2=fa636269-6b19-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210919-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYzNjI2OS02YjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mazb3QVgwf5R7gMUdfdppZNnr7sXu9cx6URG525PAq4=)
But the months since her death have revealed the urgency of fighting to uphold her legacy.
We saw Mitch McConnell break his own precedent and ram Donald Trump’s nominee through right before Election Day. It was a blatant push to make the court more partisan and further their own extreme agenda.
Now, we’re seeing attacks on our fundamental rights by state legislatures across the country. In the last few weeks, Texas enacted extreme voter suppression and anti-choice legislation.
It’s in these moments, when our democracy is on the line, that I’m reminded of her advice:
_**“Fight for the things you care about, but do it in a way that will lead others to join you."**_
This is exactly what we must do if we’re going to honor Justice Ginsburg’s legacy and secure justice.
I pledge to always fight for our shared values in the Senate. We can make real progress on voting rights, affordable health care, reproductive freedom and more, but it will only be possible if we are in this together.
[**Will you please join our fight to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat by making a $3 donation to our campaign today? We must repair the damage Republicans have done to the court and our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36050068/306966424/1741212721?refcode2=fa636269-6b19-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210919-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYzNjI2OS02YjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mazb3QVgwf5R7gMUdfdppZNnr7sXu9cx6URG525PAq4=)
Thank you for being part of this.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36050069/306966425/1741212721?refcode2=fa636269-6b19-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210919-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYzNjI2OS02YjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mazb3QVgwf5R7gMUdfdppZNnr7sXu9cx6URG525PAq4=)**

name: Connor Boyack
subject: This is who is teaching your kids
body:
I am now working on the next big Tuttle Twins project — The Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv2hqq8faefgfuk3uh7mp23n2356i2sjgjaj3dqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbclhe5gr1ddk68qredr76dhrbd1gm9gnaotmcoq66t9me1obactleqpb2cjn63jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eap6cd32mmoefcjmcoqe1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cph60pr4cdhm4oh5u)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkfb4cer03m652gqkj0aaveitc5ib9vtjpdlaes0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1jm8or3c9h2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

The creator of the 1619 Project said this about Cuba:

"If you want to see... the most equal, multiracial country in our hemisphere, it would be Cuba... and that's largely due to socialism." \- Nikole Hannah-Jones

Hilariously awful, right? We already know that socialism obviously doesn't lead to equality, and is not the answer to create a free society. But it gets even scarier.
* The **Biden administration** is pushing for public schools to accept the foundations of the 1619 Project when teaching history.

* This push to reframe education isn't only about race or even history. It's about raising "equality" as the gold standard... and **liberty as an archaic, evil** , merit-based value system. As a result, grades and students will suffer.

* Open socialists, communists, and **Antifa members** are trying to hijack our education system.

Friend, here's how we fight back.

I am the author of the Tuttle Twins. The Tuttle Twins is a popular kids series that teaches about liberty, personal responsibility, and free markets. **We have distributed over 2.5 MILLION copies to families and kids across the country. **

I am now working on the next big Tuttle Twins project -- The Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum.

[**Can you donate $10 or more and help distribute the Tuttle Twins American History curriculum to schools and home-school families? Click here to donate >>** ](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdvs5nhkaj4n5d2fpokomq8btko48q0cibitnrrg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1jm8or3c9h2bs)

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb75qmbrpl0rvc81rt7d81reb5g4l86lrslpmlto_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1jm8or3c9h2bs)

I am asking for your support today to get the curriculum distributed by 2022. I am hoping to raise $50,000 in the next 5 days to finish this important project.

* We are hiring a renowned historian who understands the importance of storytelling and who has a very popular podcast, "History that Doesn't Suck."

* We will employ two additional writers to help me produce the content and incorporate the history facts and lessons accurately and entertainingly.

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: My COVID-19 story, and an invitation to share yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
Happy Sunday, Peter.

On this day that many folks set aside for rest and reflection, I’m thinking about what a journey we’ve all been on together over these last 18 months.

When I first heard of a new, contagious, deadly coronavirus overseas, I was apprehensive and concerned, but confident that we’d rise to the challenge, as Tennesseans always have. Like most of us, I never could have imagined how much our lives would change, and are still changing, because of it.

I believe that if we're going to move forward, we have to first understand what we’ve been through, collectively and individually. So, I wanted to invite you to share your COVID-19 story — it doesn’t have to be political or aimed at Bill Lee (though that’s obviously fair game); it can just come from you and your experience.

Share your story [https://secure.ngpvan.com/q78E9IrvI0uONPUf42bTLg2]

Most of you know at least some part of my COVID-19 story. But for those who don’t, I’ll share a little bit now.

As an ICU physician, I was on the front lines of this pandemic from the very beginning. And let me tell you, those first days and weeks were terrifying. Even though my age group appeared to be relatively safe, at least statistically, the sheer randomness of the virus hung over us at all hours of the day. So much was unknown that it often felt like we were operating in the dark; our emergency room was quickly overwhelmed, and stayed that way for months. I made the decision to isolate myself away from my wife and three daughters, and ultimately spent 7 weeks apart from them. Saying goodbye, not knowing when I’d see them again, was one of the hardest mornings of my life.

But what sticks with me most is the pain that I witnessed firsthand in that hospital. Holding up iPads while mamas, daddies, sons, and daughters told their loved ones goodbye from the parking lot. Nurses — whose courage and fortitude was one of the most inspiring things I have ever seen in my time on this earth — worn down and exhausted. The sounds of labored breathing, intubation machines, and calls for crash carts.
If it wasn’t obvious already, those experiences are the defining reason why I knew Tennesseans need new leadership and a governor who will fight for all of us. The pain of those moments in the hospital was so disconnected from the abdication of leadership by Gov. Lee that it seemed impossible. How could our leaders let this happen? How could they stand by while our hospitals were overrun and our friends and neighbors were cut down by the virus?

Enough is enough.

This email ended up being a bit longer than I’d intended, but I hope that sharing this piece of my own COVID-19 story invites you to share yours. If you have a moment, please do so here. I’m listening. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/q78E9IrvI0uONPUf42bTLg2]

Thanks for taking the time to read this,

Dr. Jason Martin

Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martin-email-sep2021?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210919covid19story_JM_op_xx_pt

https://www.facebook.com/Doctor-Jason-Martin-109817601409858 [https://www.facebook.com/Doctor-Jason-Martin-109817601409858] https://twitter.com/jasonbmartin [https://twitter.com/jasonbmartin]
www.martinfortn.com [https://www.martinfortn.com/]
Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
1831 12th Avenue S #175
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

subject: Yes, I have COVID
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
The leftist media is LOVING the fact that I was diagnosed with COVID this week.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W8dr2t4bQpVF68l8pYdsXw/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W8dr2t4bQpVF68l8pYdsXw/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4N40qIaSrB9mCvz0iHy4yA/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw)
Patriot,

The leftist media is LOVING the fact that I was diagnosed with COVID this week.

Even Chris Cuomo at CNN decide to jump in and mock me:

Their hopes that I die are a clear reminder that the left’s growing outrage over supposed increased COVID deaths is all for show and political gain.

I’m sick, and yes, I have a bad case of COVID and my symptoms are unpleasant, but as I recover, I’m still here working from home and hope to feel better each morning.

No, I’m not vaccinated. And no, I won’t be getting the COVID vaccine.

I knew it was only a matter of time before I got it, and I accepted that risk over injecting myself with an experimental vaccine at the government’s demand.

I know I’ll recover just fine, and who knows the horrendous long-term risks if I had taken the vaccine.

This should be a personal choice for all of us, but the Biden Regime doesn’t know the meaning of individual liberty.

Now that I covered that, [**I need to get your support as the FEC deadline is coming up fast**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W8dr2t4bQpVF68l8pYdsXw/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw).

| | [DONATE NOW](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W8dr2t4bQpVF68l8pYdsXw/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw)
---

I just have 13 days left to raise enough money to compete against my Do-Nothing opponent, Daniel Webster.

Normally, I’m on the phones for seven hours every day calling up every supporter that I can, but you can barely understand my cracked voice right now, so I have to write to you instead.

It’s important that we elect people like me to Congress who will stand up to these unconstitutional vaccine mandates, no matter how much the media tries to shame or mock them.

[**Would you be willing to go big for me today?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/OBG4XAhQL4wxsaYRYWq4qQ/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw)

[**$25, $100, $250 or a max donation would REALLY help put my campaign on track!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/OBG4XAhQL4wxsaYRYWq4qQ/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw)

Anything you can donate will be sincerely appreciated.

Do-Nothing Dan is sitting on $302,000 as of his last report. And I know that since I announced that I’d be running against him, he’s called in help from every lobbyist and special interest PAC out there for donations to try and scare me off.

My goal is to hit at least a third of that before the deadline in 13 days.

[**Any amount you can contribute**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W8dr2t4bQpVF68l8pYdsXw/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw) will build up my campaign war chest and prove to the leftist media and the Establishment naysayers that we’re in this to WIN!

Thanks again for all that you do, and if you haven’t already done so, [**please donate here**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W8dr2t4bQpVF68l8pYdsXw/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I’m looking forward to fully recovering so I can get back to the campaign trail and keep fighting for you and our personal liberties.

| [DONATE $10](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4N40qIaSrB9mCvz0iHy4yA/A77638lttHaiz8TvTS1q70Tw)

name: =?utf-8?Q?SSG=20Brian=20Mast=2C=20U.S.=20Army=20=28ret.=29?=
subject: I was blown up in Afghanistan 11 years ago today. Please, I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend,

**11 years ago today I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. ** I am only alive because when the bomb went off, my fellow soldiers ran towards the explosion instead of away. _They refused to leave me behind._
---
|
---
---
|
---
| Now, Joe Biden has sentenced Americans and thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned that most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind.

I want to share my reflections on the situation in Afghanistan 11 years after being blown up, but first, I need to ask for your help to defeat Joe Biden. His actions were a betrayal of thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. He doesn’t deserve to have the words “commander” or “chief” anywhere near his title.

**Please, on this anniversary of my “Alive Day,” can I count on you to help me defeat Joe Biden?**
---
| [Donate Now to Stop Biden](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9b5e3029ed&e=1050d051da "Donate Now to Stop Biden")
---
| For me, this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster...

**On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target.** As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs.

**That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it.** I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn’t sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren’t.

**Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan.** The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones—I made it home.

**As I reflect back on that night, it is clear to me that the fight for freedom won’t be won unless we all work together.** Just like I’d be dead if my fellow soldiers hadn’t run toward that explosion, our country stands no chance of surviving if we don’t work together now to defend liberty and freedom here at home.

**But Joe Biden has proven that he cares more about political optics than the common good. That’s why we must come together to defeat Joe Biden. **

[So, I’m asking: just like I relied on my fellow soldiers in Afghanistan to save my life, I need to rely on you now. Can I count on you to help?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=038fa2048f&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| [Donate $10](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a94f904d3c&e=1050d051da "Donate $10")
---
| [Donate $25](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=810af08ae3&e=1050d051da "Donate $25")
---
| [Donate $50](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=067bee3c0f&e=1050d051da "Donate $50")
---
| [Donate $100](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8b3d395c86&e=1050d051da "Donate $100")
---
| Together we can stop Joe Biden and defend our country from tyranny! Thank you for your support,
SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)

body:
|
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z58f83upknr6b374k4n0f32002n6nh0m3tckk800_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1jm2ob2c1h2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4sij3dmlvshsm8e7qabsb9muav621tftakmj9jg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1jm2ob2c1h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsm67jhd84ilaehgjkpls0auiimphjijk9e8qc00_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1jm2ob2c1h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8nisdo9tv3b7jevqbthmvveokhhpc42ihhgj4r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1jm2ob2c1h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc7lbl8tpr152e8v1624br2jnfdl733kv82iktpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1jm2ob2c1h2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Friends — In just a moment, [**I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Seth Moulton.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36053199/306976421/1927938479?refcode=20210919_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmY0Zjc3OS03NjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38l_fBaUJEXdcwptcHO025OTvl0nlUNGQu1kgUMqNUQ=) Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here is the truth: When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office. Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona. [**So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I am asking you to contribute $15 to help me fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36053200/306976422/1927938479?refcode=20210919_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmY0Zjc3OS03NjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38l_fBaUJEXdcwptcHO025OTvl0nlUNGQu1kgUMqNUQ=) I know $15 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $15. And they’re hoping you do the same. It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. So I am asking: [**Can you please split a $15 contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton before this critical, end-of-quarter fundraising deadline comes to a close? We’ll put your donation right to work to help us win this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36053201/306976423/1927938479?refcode=20210919_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmY0Zjc3OS03NjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38l_fBaUJEXdcwptcHO025OTvl0nlUNGQu1kgUMqNUQ=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36053202/306976424/-1534947712?refcode=20210919_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmY0Zjc3OS03NjE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38l_fBaUJEXdcwptcHO025OTvl0nlUNGQu1kgUMqNUQ=)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: This will be the shortest email you read all day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The Q3 FEC fundraising deadline will be the single-biggest test we have faced as a campaign since John launched.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210919-2690-header&t=1&akid=2690%2E434096%2EcZHbSK)
Peter,
I know it's the weekend! So I'm hoping this is the shortest email you read all day:
**Our 3rd quarter FEC deadline coming up in only 11 days will be the single biggest test we've faced since John first launched his campaign to fight for us in the Senate.**
[**_You have yet to chip in directly to John Fetterman's campaign, so I'm respectfully asking you before this big deadline: Will you kick in $5 right now to help close the gap on our fundraising ahead of our giant FEC deadline?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30161?refcode=em20210919-2690&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2690%2E434096%2EcZHbSK)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30161?refcode=em20210919-2690&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2690%2E434096%2EcZHbSK)**
Thank you, and enjoy your Sunday!
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210919-2690-footer&t=22&refcode2=2690_434096_cZHbSK&akid=2690%2E434096%2EcZHbSK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=2690%2E434096%2EcZHbSK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2690%2E434096%2EcZHbSK)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I was blown up in Afghanistan 11 years ago today. Please, I need your help.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [ ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=3aeee3d3cafe44a7a0e19c37fb99ed8b&_e=_TEE2bK4kZIx_6Hx7BN4jcgkkzxAu6Rq02zNPH2KFGtxY_P-v3rHkg0RlP8A0cEkE5C_O3GcDRJjvu8nutOTEw-ND1NQnhJZiIbgbD9c3C3ihdxVnToV7HIrt1bS2kdQjlHqWNNrpdu3Cv4l0P8m4uehZRngfqKY5nhwZ-nuVLfVS8UtUdvmmTppcPzzjzOh_p1a6JQGEidIBLVIpcC629Ex2w8XC3IqacOpXlC93c-URwzQLNZlubJYekHfcEcnB1niXC7Yz0XDSZ7dH6auJLdt3A04DiWRKUzHgFeqgCTG_aZKSePmo11V-TdjA5Lc)
---
| Friend, **11 years ago today I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. **I am only alive because when the bomb went off, my fellow soldiers ran towards the explosion instead of away. _They refused to leave me behind._
---
| [ ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=3aeee3d3cafe44a7a0e19c37fb99ed8b&_e=_TEE2bK4kZIx_6Hx7BN4jcgkkzxAu6Rq02zNPH2KFGtxY_P-v3rHkg0RlP8A0cEkE5C_O3GcDRJjvu8nutOTEw-ND1NQnhJZiIbgbD9c3C3PT4jxCPI_C37vK-0y9Sq07s8vvriHODL8A7ctwSqDdU4hT0yAxT9AtNWREk8kyewLr4P68La9UR_OyyF8fP4QgTyPfwbfH6Tgt79BBNZS6HR85nxgTwj_9LOadHq0rtmUrqNJmWgUq0Lb3TU0jgKGSkm5w2HoPdSZTP69HPGQu0RJkG1gS8r9R7C4CMIdYYYRo-kxS4hYOumFogZfIrmA)
---
| Now, Joe Biden has sentenced Americans and thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned that most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind.

I want to share my reflections on the situation in Afghanistan 11 years after being blown up, but first, I need to ask for your help to defeat Joe Biden. His actions were a betrayal of thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. He doesn’t deserve to have the words “commander” or “chief” anywhere near his title.

**Please, on this anniversary of my “Alive Day,” can I count on you to help me defeat Joe Biden? **
---
| [DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=3aeee3d3cafe44a7a0e19c37fb99ed8b&_e=_TEE2bK4kZIx_6Hx7BN4jcgkkzxAu6Rq02zNPH2KFGtxY_P-v3rHkg0RlP8A0cEkE5C_O3GcDRJjvu8nutOTEw-ND1NQnhJZiIbgbD9c3C0IRBubZo-hP-4zeJma7bWdVCgI4WBtfO8bF9rgpRGi0GcuCf7rBG4SZjj9Hcbu8r51Q81D6IU5_o58fcZgJ9tSB9rMvjG9daep43U67eIiA1F57sY0oaaIxcRcMjoAZvXb54LaFF_MHGbGMG9kwTv-ViwOarjfs34d8cZIAcYYK6zxhbGq5Npi7uUOE1-9JMMaKhAgfAMU96aPuc4SpI67 "DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN")
---
| For me, this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster...

**On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target.** As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs.

**That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it.** I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn’t sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren’t.

**Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan.** The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones—I made it home.

**As I reflect back on that night, it is clear to me that the fight for freedom won’t be won unless we all work together. **Just like I’d be dead if my fellow soldiers hadn’t run toward that explosion, our country stands no chance of surviving if we don’t work together now to defend liberty and freedom here at home.

**But Joe Biden has proven that he cares more about political optics than the common good. That’s why we must come together to defeat Joe Biden.**

[**So, I’m asking: just like I relied on my fellow soldiers in Afghanistan to save my life, I need to rely on you now. Can I count on you to help?**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=3aeee3d3cafe44a7a0e19c37fb99ed8b&_e=_TEE2bK4kZIx_6Hx7BN4jcgkkzxAu6Rq02zNPH2KFGtxY_P-v3rHkg0RlP8A0cEkLyZDWBZbgujk7l1UE9RjSB4jnzWuTOK7nVvGwYvWlmgBNPWixbaChp9JCN-ZMH0M6F_OuQ38JzBzO3yMmcyp82HxXjWTplgz-hJVp2wHXgH7QSM_cd3ZyHQurqMm-yiDiF8JZMxKTftFfZ51jAOzVQYSRU06gIMkuB-XR7czNs6zDalDiU865JfJBnlyPrR3ullCBulnf4t-qh0NC26k3mrZMofRfLNtmTk2u_jDrHrDJWPLXjynbkMJUhB4i74_)

clean_body: |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | | Friend, 11 years ago today I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. I am only alive because when the bomb went off, my fellow soldiers ran towards the explosion instead of away. They refused to leave me behind. | | Now, Joe Biden has sentenced Americans and thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned that most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. I want to share my reflections on the situation in Afghanistan 11 years after being blown up, but first, I need to ask for your help to defeat Joe Biden. His actions were a betrayal of thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. He doesn’t deserve to have the words “commander” or “chief” anywhere near his title. Please, on this anniversary of my “Alive Day,” can I count on you to help me defeat Joe Biden? | "DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN" | For me, this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster... On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it. I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn’t sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren’t. Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones—I made it home. As I reflect back on that night, it is clear to me that the fight for freedom won’t be won unless we all work together. Just like I’d be dead if my fellow soldiers hadn’t run toward that explosion, our country stands no chance of surviving if we don’t work together now to defend liberty and freedom here at home. But Joe Biden has proven that he cares more about political optics than the common good. That’s why we must come together to defeat Joe Biden. | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $100" | "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT" | Together we can stop Joe Biden and defend our country from tyranny! | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Brian Mast is a U.S. Army Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Army. | | Mast for Congress | MastForCongress.com PO Box 3016, Stuart, FL 34995 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

| | I know me and my team have sent you a lot of emails this week.

But I just checked in with them and I knew I had to reach out immediately.

_They told me I only need[**1 more gift**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36055974/306986824/1129282168?refcode=20210919_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqAOoRwM4t5jNtt2Wcxxr93dQ39_gHanTdDjt2Ix4Iw=) from 18326 to hit my End-of-Week Goal!_

[**_I’m going to explain why your support is so important but, if you’re in a rush, will you please chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36055975/306986850/1129282168?refcode=20210919_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqAOoRwM4t5jNtt2Wcxxr93dQ39_gHanTdDjt2Ix4Iw=)

Unlike many political candidates, I’ve experienced the struggles that hardworking Americans face everyday.

I grew up in poverty. And I know the feeling of living paycheck to paycheck, without any sort of safety net to rely on.

So when Congressman Don Bacon voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations instead of helping hardworking families, I knew I needed to replace him.

[**But the fact is: running for office is incredibly expensive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36055976/306986884/1129282168?refcode=20210919_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqAOoRwM4t5jNtt2Wcxxr93dQ39_gHanTdDjt2Ix4Iw=)

And I can’t personally fund my own campaign.

[**_I know we need more everyday people representing and fighting for us in Congress -- and I’m running to do just that. But I need to stay on track and reach my End-of-Week Goal before midnight, or I’ll be forced to make serious budget cuts. I can make it if one more supporter from 18326 chips in, so I’m humbly asking:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36055977/306986890/1129282168?refcode=20210919_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqAOoRwM4t5jNtt2Wcxxr93dQ39_gHanTdDjt2Ix4Iw=) [**Can I count on your $10?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36055979/306986898/1129282168?refcode=20210919_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqAOoRwM4t5jNtt2Wcxxr93dQ39_gHanTdDjt2Ix4Iw=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36055983/306986906/1129282168?refcode=20210919_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqAOoRwM4t5jNtt2Wcxxr93dQ39_gHanTdDjt2Ix4Iw=)

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. clean_body: I just checked in with my team... | | | I know me and my team have sent you a lot of emails this week. But I just checked in with them and I knew I had to reach out immediately. They told me I only need= from 18326 to hit my End-of-Week Goal! = Unlike many political candidates, I’ve experienced the struggles that hardworking Americans face everyday. I grew up in poverty. And I know the feeling of living paycheck to paycheck, without any sort of safety net to rely on. So when Congressman Don Bacon voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations instead of helping hardworking families, I knew I needed to replace him. = And I can’t personally fund my own campaign. = = | | = | = | = | = | = | = From the bottom of my heart, thank you -- Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: ** We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! Tony Vargas for Congress PO Box 746 Boys Town, NE 68010 United States info@vargasfornebraska.com | | Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress

| | Peter, Today calls for celebration. It’s officially been 200 days since we launched our campaign to take back NC-11 and lead with compassion and unity. Since then, we’ve received an outpouring of support from all over NC-11. From union members and teachers to folks like you, Peter, who believe in Jasmine and our campaign’s vision. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36056070/306987522/-157601791?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210919_FR_200Days_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixuwTG-1BiFpvmBH8qS81qs9la-ojBWgQmrNVyg4Gag=) While we’re proud of what we’ve built together so far,**** there is still **so much work to get done**. If we want to defeat Republican Madison Cawthorn, it’s going to take all of us working together to take back NC-11. [**Will you donate $5 or more to keep up the momentum we started 200 days ago?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36056075/306987527/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210919_FR_200Days_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixuwTG-1BiFpvmBH8qS81qs9la-ojBWgQmrNVyg4Gag=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36056078/306987529/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210919_FR_200Days_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2VjYmEyYS04NDE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixuwTG-1BiFpvmBH8qS81qs9la-ojBWgQmrNVyg4Gag=)
