Here’s a recap of all that we’ve achieved in the past 200 days, and what we’re continuing to do until we win this race:
* We’ve knocked on doors in six of NC-11’s seventeen counties, and we’re just getting started #OrganizingEverywhere. From virtual phone banks to football tailgates, we’re committed to showing up to meet people where they are, do a lot of listening, and build connections and community.
* We have had more than 21,000 online contributions to our campaign since we launched. These numbers are proof of the people-powered movement we’re building, and we couldn’t be prouder. And that support has meant we could build the grassroots infrastructure we need to win, from day one.
* Jasmine has earned the support of organizations like the SMART Union, Equality Pac, Vote Mama, LPAC and When Dems Turn Out, as well as elected and community leaders across Western North Carolina.
* From parking lots to front porches, we’re out there connecting with people in their hometowns and also being real, talking about our values -- love, hope, and empathy -- and what we stand for -- like universal pre-k, voting rights, rural broadband, jobs that pay a dignified wage, and the right to choose.
* We’ve helped our community by providing updates on how to stay safe during the pandemic and supporting fundraising efforts for WNC residents who were affected by last month’s intense floods.
* We were the first campaign to call for Cawthorn to be removed from office due to his dangerous and anti-democratic actions on and after January 6th.

**And while we’ve come a long way from where we started 200 days ago, there are many miles to go in this journey.**
[**With your support we are going to defeat Cawthorn and elect real leadership for NC-11. body:
Here is where we stand:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36057271/306992126/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBiMzc1Yy04ODE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2xSCWs4jHeaRwgXGY2CI6lOiMJXgdZYHJPUJdEHXaU=)
---
Hey Peter, it’s Rachel with Hala Ayala’s Democratic campaign for Lt. Governor.

As you know by now, our last fundraising deadline of this entire election is at the end of this month. **I just crunched the numbers, so I wanted to personally reach out to show you where we stand:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36057273/306992127/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=HAFV_20210919_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBiMzc1Yy04ODE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2xSCWs4jHeaRwgXGY2CI6lOiMJXgdZYHJPUJdEHXaU=) Our entire team ‐‐ _especially Hala!_ ‐‐ is humbled by the outpouring of grassroots support for this historic campaign. [**So will you chip in a $3 donation today to keep this momentum strong? name: Team Padilla
subject: Legally required to report our numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
The measure of success on this campaign is more than the amount of money we raise, it’s how many people are standing with Alex and fighting for change.
#

We’re quickly approaching our September FEC fundraising deadline, so we wanted to give you a short rundown of what’s to come.
* After this deadline on September 30, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers.
* Not only will we report how much money we’ve raised, we’ll also report the number of people who donated to keep Alex in the Senate.
* So our team has set a goal of 1,000 individual contributions between today and midnight on September 30.

[**Now that the Recall is over, Republicans in California have set their sights on Alex. Can you make a contribution today so we can hit our fundraising goal and show that we are serious about keeping this seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210919-1-15&t=1&refcode2=332_159979_V7DKI4&akid=332%2E159979%2EV7DKI4)

subject: Our first big test since the poll

body:
| | Hi Peter, Wanted to make sure you saw Josh's urgent note. Last week, we found out polls have us down seven points against a Republican opponent. And our first public fundraising report since the poll is coming at the end of the month. So we need your help to show our strength before it's too late - [**can you chip in today to get us ahead of the race?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bmZBRpVr4Py1Js3Gw8hdaiuPxXC7zaDMVXfelUS-nkU=/4wrw1Taw41W4fQrQhOEZSkd13VF37D93EkJG19fG-Qo=?refcode=E11356-20210919-PersonalKicker-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Josh is already at the top of the Republicans' target list for 2022. And the GOP attack ads that have been running against Josh all summer are clearly working - tens of thousands of voters have now seen them. Our end-of-month report is the most important opportunity we have to demonstrate we still believe in Josh and we're ready to fight back. **We can 't risk losing Josh's seat to a right-wing extremist who will turn back the clock on women's health care or denies climate change even exists. We can't undo all the progress we've made.** [**Peter, a lot is resting on our next fundraising report, and it 's going to be a tough fight - one we're ready to take on. Will you join us in and help make this quarter our strongest yet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bmZBRpVr4Py1Js3Gw8hdaiuPxXC7zaDMVXfelUS-nkU=/4wrw1Taw41W4fQrQhOEZSkd13VF37D93EkJG19fG-Qo=?refcode=E11306-20210915-Personal-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Thanks for your support,
Team Harder

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bmZBRpVr4Py1Js3Gw8hdaiuPxXC7zaDMVXfelUS-nkU=/4wrw1Taw41W4fQrQhOEZSkd13VF37D93EkJG19fG-Qo=?refcode=E11356-20210919-PersonalKicker-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) Peter, My team and I have been reaching out all summer warning about the onslaught of GOP attack ads we're getting hit with. I wanted to make sure you all knew how intense the ad spending was getting because I suspected it was going to cause us some real problems. Then we got the poll that has us down seven points. And that solidified it for me, we're in real trouble. I didn't expect to be so far behind this early, but... here we are. So, here's how we need to fight back: Our September end-of-quarter deadline will be the most important one I've had in my career. _We have to raise enough money to show we 're still in this race. If we don't, then we're in very bad shape._ The best way you can help right now is to donate to our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. [**Please rush a donation of $15 so we can send in the strongest grassroots fundraising report we possibly can at the end of the month and show we 're still in this fight.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bmZBRpVr4Py1Js3Gw8hdaiuPxXC7zaDMVXfelUS-nkU=/4wrw1Taw41W4fQrQhOEZSkd13VF37D93EkJG19fG-Qo=?refcode=E11356-20210919-PersonalKicker-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/bmZBRpVr4Py1Js3Gw8hdaiuPxXC7zaDMVXfelUS-nkU=/4wrw1Taw41W4fQrQhOEZSkd13VF37D93EkJG19fG-Qo=?express_lane=true&refcode=E11356-20210919-PersonalKicker-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

This is our last chance to stop the GOP from going all-out to flip California's most competitive seat. If they see this next fundraising report and it's not where we need it to be, they're going to attack us even more and the next poll is going to have us down by even more.
I'm telling you, if we lose this seat, there's no way we're going to keep the House majority.
[**So please, this is really urgent. I need you to donate $15 or as much as you can to strengthen my upcoming fundraising report before it goes public.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bmZBRpVr4Py1Js3Gw8hdaiuPxXC7zaDMVXfelUS-nkU=/4wrw1Taw41W4fQrQhOEZSkd13VF37D93EkJG19fG-Qo=?refcode=E11356-20210919-PersonalKicker-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Always appreciative,
Josh

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv8e41nbvsbhi6gn3m7h4hk27cqnvo2tgk5tq8to_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1geaoj4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zg2p6o4rjeo5vsk194pd52iqaca42eoeeou1o2k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1geaoj4c3h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmg58kpsta9objkmpnnfn6qv0a0jqir6rmhpl4ho_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c1geaoj4c3h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

clean_body: Stand with the Capitol Police | | | BREAKING: Some of the heroic Capitol Police officers who protected our Democracy on January 6 are taking the fight directly to the source. According to a report in the New York Times, these brave men and women are suing Donald Trump, his allies, and those who perpetrated the “Big Lie.” These brave Capitol Police Officers deserve justice for the horrors inflicted upon them on January 6th. Donald Trump must be held accountable for the deadly insurrection he incited that day. We want to know -- We can’t let what happened on January 6 ever happen again, Derek. That’s why this is so important. If Trump and his allies think they can get away with this, they’ve got another thing coming. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Great America Update
subject: Hamilton, Jay, and Madison
body:
I hope you’re having a good day today. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c348%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=hI2BCW4djKKFlc%2b0OAs6ug&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66541%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ApOnQJao%2bDlj0BmMwwb4ig&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66542%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FjfMEV1lwreWsIFBkfHvGA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
I hope you’re having a good day today.
You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated.
It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges?
Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given us the guide: The Federalist Papers.
These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described **[The Federalist Papers](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66543%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nSMuJdSKAMh%2boLHHPgOirQ&sysid=1)** as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to give you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale’s free online course,**[“The Federalist Papers,”](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66544%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=36dGEKzednfhvI%2fQPhW81Q&sysid=1)** today.
Taught by Hillsdale College’s politics faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the nature of the three branches of government, and the argument concerning the Bill of Rights.
Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll activate your free enrollment in **[“The Federalist Papers”](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66655%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r44ZlKg6VmfwjrblG%2bW8SQ&sysid=1)** today.
[Activate your free course now »](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66656%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zbtcMRbmxdhWw1skH5YSaw&sysid=1)
Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
* * *

## What students are saying
“Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life.” **\- Fred D.** “Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge.” **\- John C.** [Activate your free course now »](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66656%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zbtcMRbmxdhWw1skH5YSaw&sysid=1)

body:
Right now is when we’re laying the foundation for victory next November. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36059885/306999522/236479786?refcode=20210920_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI0ZjlmMy05MzE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIGhCQEx0Mrrow-lu3bYOL_s8dXEvnPAaTGSUoSQRdI=)

Friend,

Our campaign is still in its early phase and there is a TON of work to do before voters hit the polls next November. Even though there’s a lot of time between now and then, **these are the most important months of the campaign** \-- because right now is when we’re building the foundation of the grassroots movement that will propel Charlie to victory in 2022.

If you haven’t already guessed, we’re emailing you to ask **[for your grassroots support](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36059886/306999523/236479786?refcode=20210920_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI0ZjlmMy05MzE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIGhCQEx0Mrrow-lu3bYOL_s8dXEvnPAaTGSUoSQRdI=)** as we set the stage for victory next November. Your donation at this early stage of the campaign will help us accomplish a number of critically important tasks:
* **Register and mobilize the new voters** Charlie needs to defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis in November
* **Stay in touch with established supporters** to make sure Charlie knows what’s on Floridians’ minds as the campaign progresses
* **Persuade voters who are on the fence** by contrasting Charlie’s record of fighting for all Floridians with Gov. DeSantis’ record of extreme, polarizing, and damaging policies
* **Build the grassroots organization** it’s going to take to make sure all of Charlie’s supporters get to the polls in November

**[Will you make a donation to Charlie’s campaign now to help us do all these things and more as we build the campaign it’ll take to defeat Gov. DeSantis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36059887/306999524/236479786?refcode=20210920_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDI0ZjlmMy05MzE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIGhCQEx0Mrrow-lu3bYOL_s8dXEvnPAaTGSUoSQRdI=)**

Make no mistake: **Gov. DeSantis and his extreme, far-right allies are using these early months to raise as much money as possible** from their wealthy corporate backers. When campaign season ramps up, they’re going to have seemingly unlimited funds to smear Charlie on TV, radio, the internet, and anywhere else they can think of.

**We’re counting on grassroots supporters like YOU to ensure we have the resources to fight back. If you can, please make a donation of any amount today to help us keep building the campaign we need to power Charlie to victory next November:**

Even though there’s a lot of time between now and then, these are the most important months of the campaign \-- because right now is when we’re building the foundation of the grassroots movement that will propel Charlie to victory in 2022. name: Tiera Johnson
subject: Will you let me share my story with you, Peter?
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36060359/307001405/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjg5ZDk3YS05NTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5ef1nbr4xZkNxCHg5UOzKps5oa0msBrx_Japq9SxuI=&emci=6705c942-d617-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=0b89d97a-9519-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4925535) I am overjoyed that you are a part of our team, Peter. I wake up with a sense of purpose every day and it's because I want to create a better future for you and families like yours. I couldn't be more proud that this team is fueled by everyday Hoosiers who just want to do the right thing. _Our team is fueled by families calling for more affordable health care; it's fueled by public educators who want better pay and fully-funded public schools; it's fueled by those who wish for more affordable housing; it's fueled by Hoosiers deserve higher wages._ **I wanted to work for the party because of people like you who inspire us to fight for what is right and for what creates a better tomorrow for our home. And here's a big one: Thanks to President Joe Biden, Vice President Kamala Harris, and Indiana Democrats, we were able to deliver the opportunity to lift more than 80,000 children out of poverty with the Child Tax Credit disproportionately benefiting states like ours.** [**Donate Here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36060360/307001406/624230061?refcode=FR.09.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjg5ZDk3YS05NTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5ef1nbr4xZkNxCHg5UOzKps5oa0msBrx_Japq9SxuI=) As a mom of 4 children all under the age of 8, I respect the sacrifices that Hoosier families make to make ends meet, and I understand that we need to take care of Hoosiers - no matter the zip code - but more than anything, **being a mom has taught me that children are the future of our country. Meeting Hoosiers and their families where they are is our path forward and how we will win in 2022. But it does cost money to get out on the road to listen to Hoosiers' needs and ideas and that's why we count on grassroots supporters like you, Peter.** [_**Will you make a $10 donation to the Indiana Democratic Party today to help us reach Hoosiers all over - no matter the zip code - and get Democrats elected up and down the ballot?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36060361/307001407/624230061?refcode=FR.09.18.21.&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjg5ZDk3YS05NTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5ef1nbr4xZkNxCHg5UOzKps5oa0msBrx_Japq9SxuI=) When I was younger, I witnessed so many friends struggle to follow along in school because they were too hungry to focus or too tired from working to stay awake in class. Some of them unable to reach their full potential in school due to the stress of trying to make ends meet. I knew that this was wrong, cruel and unjust. Some of my friends, including myself, were able to break the ceiling that was put above us. **But for far too many they are never able to break that ceiling or never had the luck to meet an individual willing to help them; since then I have dedicated my life toward fighting for justice,** ending child poverty, increasing affordable housing, getting rid of food deserts, and creating more options for affordable childcare. Over the course of my time as a mom, I have met the most incredible Hoosier families. Too often their stories are ones of struggle - evictions, choosing between life-saving medications or food on the table, utility bills or rent, lack of job opportunities and growth, and more. **But each one of their stories sparked a flame within me to never give up the fight for what's right.** [_**So now I'm going to ask you to help by joining in the fight for more winning policies and opportunities like the Child Tax Credit that will benefit Hoosier families no matter the zip code. Chip in today to help elect more Democrats up-and-down the ballot. It makes a big difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36060362/307001408/624230061?refcode=FR.09.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjg5ZDk3YS05NTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5ef1nbr4xZkNxCHg5UOzKps5oa0msBrx_Japq9SxuI=) __Thanks for taking the time -- I'm so appreciative. In Solidarity, Tiera Johnson Digital Strategist Indiana Democratic Party If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: name: Lexie
subject: We’re on dangerous ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=920%2E3611125%2E8_Fgug ][IMG]

Folks, do you want to hear the good news or the bad news first?

I’ll start with the bad news: we fell short. We didn’t hit our mid-month
fundraising goal last night.

Now, we’re at risk of falling behind for the entire month and posting low
numbers for our public FEC report -- that will make us look vulnerable.

Here’s the good news: we can make up this lost ground if everyone reading
this email chips in a few bucks today.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3453?t=1007&akid=920%2E3611125%2E8_Fgug ]Can you rush a donation of $5, $25, or more to help us catch up so we
can flip this Senate seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3453?t=1008&akid=920%2E3611125%2E8_Fgug ]Count me in >>

The Senate majority hinges on this race. Polling shows a razor-thin margin
between Tim and his Republican opponents, but with our fundraising
shortfalls, we are on dangerous ground.

Unlike Tim’s opponents, we don’t have the backing of billionaire GOP super
PAC money -- we are counting on grassroots supporters like YOU to help us
get ahead.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3454?t=1009&akid=920%2E3611125%2E8_Fgug ]We need to close our fundraising gap and fast -- Will you chip in what
you’re able so we stay on track to flip this open Senate seat blue and

Now, we’re at risk of falling behind for the entire month and posting low numbers for our public FEC report -- that will make us look vulnerable. Here’s the good news: we can make up this lost ground if everyone reading this email chips in a few bucks today. name: RESPONSE REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: Requesting your response ASAP⏳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | | [**OFFICIAL SEPTEMBER PRIORITIES SURVEY:****
FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com**

House Republicans have NEVER been more dangerous, which means our Democratic House Majority has NEVER been more important.

At this pivotal moment, we need your help -- **and your input** \-- to help defend it.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs0~)

[**So before our midnight deadline, will you take Democratic HQ 's official September Priorities Survey and let us know what's on your mind?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)[](https://links.e.dccc.)

[](https://links.e.dccc.)[**YES!! >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)[ ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)[****](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQr_~)[**NO >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cvY2q~)
---

**We won 't sugarcoat it: **The stakes of the race to win the House Majority have never been higher.

We've watched in horror as Republicans have:

_\--**SPREAD** disinformation about vaccines and masks.
\-- **UNDERMINED** our right to vote.
\-- and **ATTACKED** reproductive rights._

With so much on the line, we can't afford to let Republicans take back power and defeat our House Majority.

**But here 's the catch: **The only way we can defend our House Majority and defeat these Republicans is if your perspectives and priorities power our grassroots campaign.

That's why we just launched our official **September Priorities Survey**.

**We need your help to build on our historic Majority and stop the Republicans from marching back into power.**

[**So before our midnight deadline, can we count on your input on our survey?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)

Thanks,

Dem HQ

---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45643373&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NDA3NjczNgS2&l=13991420&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. name: Team Heinrich
subject: [Petition] Support the Women’s Health Protection Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36063887/307018112/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210919_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNjZWVkNC1hOTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Ec3QZCo6TCEzxucSPpJakfCxNUyAUxFjk-ALqn8Ugc=&emci=f3cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f4cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
Friends, Constitutional rights should not stop and start at state lines. That’s why Martin is an original co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ — a bill that would protect the constitutional right to an abortion at the federal level. After Republicans trampled reproductive health rights in Texas, it couldn’t be more important to stop states from violating reproductive rights and undermining _Roe v. Wade_. [**Will you add your name next to Martin’s to call on the Senate to pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and guarantee reproductive rights for all, no matter the state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36063888/307018113/289218851?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210919_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNjZWVkNC1hOTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Ec3QZCo6TCEzxucSPpJakfCxNUyAUxFjk-ALqn8Ugc=&emci=f3cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f4cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36063889/307018114/289218851?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210919_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNjZWVkNC1hOTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Ec3QZCo6TCEzxucSPpJakfCxNUyAUxFjk-ALqn8Ugc=&emci=f3cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f4cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
At the heart of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ is protecting women's reproductive rights and freedom to make their own personal health care choices. The conservative-led Supreme Court has made it clear that they won’t preserve these rights, so it’s critical that we enshrine _Roe v. Wade_ into law.
**And we need to do it before the Court hears another extreme abortion ban in Mississippi and overturns _Roe_ for good. Especially when 11 states have “trigger” laws that would automatically ban abortions as soon as _Roe_ is overturned.**
**[Please, add your name to demand the Senate protect reproductive rights by passing the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36063890/307018115/289218851?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210919_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNjZWVkNC1hOTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Ec3QZCo6TCEzxucSPpJakfCxNUyAUxFjk-ALqn8Ugc=&emci=f3cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f4cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)**
[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36063891/307018116/289218851?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20210919_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNjZWVkNC1hOTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Ec3QZCo6TCEzxucSPpJakfCxNUyAUxFjk-ALqn8Ugc=&emci=f3cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=f4cceed4-a919-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you for speaking out at this crucial moment.
—Team Heinrich
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?SSG=20Brian=20Mast=2C=20U=2ES=2E=20Army=20=28ret=2E=29?=
subject: I was blown up in Afghanistan 11 years ago today. Please, I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Feenstra for Congress
body:
| | |
| [](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=qJ9juQrYQnx6GiLoZRCFRfx5vplALQMA1LebiplKf4js5R%2BwvBYsJ4dzjmH9IDYLB6CJ%2Fa2MvZ4QUI8O0NBz5j4vzH3Xxj0C9PiGsc4XEWVtL8V7v1ZH7HDIg3%2BJTqRK&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FAYUFG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DH-4Avv6sj6wrYC3v6tgUDoRNLFT5DpVR8pGxg-WM7pzFwWEp0LTc8HeX_uyzkWRK0&I=20210919203023.00000002215c%40mail6-42-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIyMDMyNjUxNjQ7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE3NjI2MzcyMTs%3D&V=3&S=j_EkmZ6WX41FaWmgiUSIHGenWAI18O5iNloKttbDEF8)
---
| Friend,
---
| **11 years ago today I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan.** I am only alive because when the bomb went off, my fellow soldiers ran towards the explosion instead of away. _They refused to leave me behind._
---
|
---
| Now, Joe Biden has sentenced Americans and thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned that most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. I want to share my reflections on the situation in Afghanistan 11 years after being blown up, but first, I need to ask for your help to defeat Joe Biden. His actions were a betrayal of thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. He doesn’t deserve to have the words “commander” or “chief” anywhere near his title. [**Please, on this anniversary of my “Alive Day,” can I count on you to help me defeat Joe Biden?**](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=qJ9juQrYQnx6GiLoZRCFRfx5vplALQMA1LebiplKf4js5R%2BwvBYsJ4dzjmH9IDYLB6CJ%2Fa2MvZ4QUI8O0NBz5j4vzH3Xxj0C9PiGsc4XEWVtL8V7v1ZH7HDIg3%2BJTqRK&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FAYUFG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DrmN3HgrUBqcqvd_oFq66mmmpKWjDKM3WIyKYxBPIhClkYzxrr9_EzsQnWG93N8n_0&I=20210919203023.00000002215c%40mail6-42-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIyMDMyNjUxNjQ7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE3NjI2MzcyMTs%3D&V=3&S=u6fOI8nH7MCykPRStWZT1fsGgpBojBl_s_B-42ajWWY)
---
| | [DONATE NOW TO STOP BIDEN](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=qJ9juQrYQnx6GiLoZRCFRfx5vplALQMA1LebiplKf4js5R%2BwvBYsJ4dzjmH9IDYLB6CJ%2Fa2MvZ4QUI8O0NBz5j4vzH3Xxj0C9PiGsc4XEWVtL8V7v1ZH7HDIg3%2BJTqRK&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FAYUFG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DHmNo0LX78CYvNdB0_rSw3SdEQiWPanoDo1j0rWXdSygICf3V79t6TQXj892wvIj60&I=20210919203023.00000002215c%40mail6-42-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIyMDMyNjUxNjQ7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE3NjI2MzcyMTs%3D&V=3&S=xX6QFS3Ec19sjOWIJqNp5N5UYMR-fGZYYpV2WwEfgrI)

| **For me, this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster...** **On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target.** As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. **That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it.** I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn’t sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren’t. **Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan.** The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones—I made it home. **** **As I reflect back on that night, it is clear to me that the fight for freedom won’t be won unless we all work together.** Just like I’d be dead if my fellow soldiers hadn’t run toward that explosion, our country stands no chance of surviving if we don’t work together now to defend liberty and freedom here at home. **** **But Joe Biden has proven that he cares more about political optics than the common good. That’s why we must come together to defeat Joe Biden.** **[So, I’m asking: just like I relied on my fellow soldiers in Afghanistan to save my life, I need to rely on you now. clean_body: | | | | | Friend, | 11 years ago today I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. I am only alive because when the bomb went off, my fellow soldiers ran towards the explosion instead of away. They refused to leave me behind. | | Now, Joe Biden has sentenced Americans and thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned that most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. I want to share my reflections on the situation in Afghanistan 11 years after being blown up, but first, I need to ask for your help to defeat Joe Biden. His actions were a betrayal of thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. He doesn’t deserve to have the words “commander” or “chief” anywhere near his title. | | | For me, this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster... On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it. I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn’t sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren’t. Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones—I made it home. ** As I reflect back on that night, it is clear to me that the fight for freedom won’t be won unless we all work together. Just like I’d be dead if my fellow soldiers hadn’t run toward that explosion, our country stands no chance of surviving if we don’t work together now to defend liberty and freedom here at home. Friend,
As the End of the Quarter nears, it is more important than ever to not let big money win the race.
We all know Liberal Lisa Murkowski is backed by the powerful Washington Insiders and dark money PACs and special interest groups. They bought her to do their dirty work and now Alaska is paying the price.

clean_body: | | | | The stakes are too high Friend, As the End of the Quarter nears, it is more important than ever to not let big money win the race. We all know Liberal Lisa Murkowski is backed by the powerful Washington Insiders and dark money PACs and special interest groups. They bought her to do their dirty work and now Alaska is paying the price. Alaska Deserves better. Our Nation deserves better. Now more than ever, we need a leader who will fight for our values in the Senate, and that is why I am running! We can’t continue to let Biden and Schumer pass their Radical Socialist agenda. In the Senate, I will always always fight for President Trump’s America First agenda. I am proud to have the FULL support of President Trump. But I can’t win this without you. The stakes have never been higher. Thanks, Kelly | | | | =

name: Susie Lee
subject: Monthly campaign update 🗓
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36064546/307028606/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUyOTgxMy1hZTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQiAkwA3WbkrfHZ7tiiNscxbv_T31CPKSMKkd2YQAII=)

| | Team, I hope you’re doing well. I’m back with another monthly update that’s filled with information you should know. So, let’s dive right into things because there’s plenty to fill you in on and 2022 will be here before we know it!
* * *
**CAMPAIGN UPDATES** Thanks to your help, I’m happy to report that **our campaign reached its mid-month goal for September.** This is a big deal for my campaign and allows us to grow our organizing program. It also signals to my Republican opponents that our broad coalition of supporters is ready to give their all to keep this district blue! On a matter that’s personal to me, I’m proud to announce that **I’ve been endorsed by NARAL — one of the nation’s top women’s reproductive freedom organizations.** Like so many of you, I’ve felt angry and worried about the uptick in legislative attacks on women’s reproductive health in Texas. Rest assured, you can count on me to fight tooth and nail in Congress to protect the right to choose. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36064547/307028628/-2054270566?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210917_FR_SEPTUPDATE_A0_NA_X1_M2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUyOTgxMy1hZTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OQiAkwA3WbkrfHZ7tiiNscxbv_T31CPKSMKkd2YQAII=)
* * *
**POLICY UPDATES** Just a few weeks back, **I voted for the budget resolution which included a historic $3.5 trillion to revitalize American infrastructure.** This important budget aims to bring billions of dollars of investment to Nevada, as well as thousands of good paying jobs. Here are just a few parts of the budget in that Nevadans have to look forward to:
* Expanding affordable quality child care and universal Pre-K programs
* Fighting the effects of climate change
* Overhauling infrastructure and investing in jobs

Folks, **I was also proud to vote in favor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.** This bill, which is awaiting a vote in the Senate, would restore a crucial piece of the Voting Rights Act by requiring preclearance on new voting laws passed in states with a history of voter suppression. That said, there’s still plenty that Congress needs to do to protect the right to vote once and for all.
* * *
**AROUND THE DISTRICT** **The third round of Child Tax Credit payments have been sent out** to 44,000 families with children across the district. This is money that parents are able to use in any way that they deem best to assist their families. Make no mistake, the benefits of the Child Tax Credit are clear. Child poverty has been cut in half and households that reported having children with not enough to eat have decreased by 3.3 million across the country. _This is what progress looks like._ As the Delta variant continues to surge in Nevada and across the country, I want to remind folks how important it is to **mask up, social distance, and get vaccinated.** The vaccine is free, safe, and overwhelmingly effective in fighting off Covid’s Delta variant. Let’s do what we can to keep ourselves and our communities safe.
* * *
With all that’s going on across the district and in our country, I wanted to thank you for continuing to support my campaign. It truly does mean the world to me. Talk to you soon, Susie

RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? For too long, my opponent Republican Devin Nunes has neglected the Central Valley’s needs and sold out to the big corporations -- and for too long his actions have gone unchecked.

I felt compelled to run and deliver better representation, and I promise I will not forget my roots.

That’s why this campaign is completely grassroots funded -- _we refuse to accept_ a single dime _of corporate PAC money._

**But my opponent can’t say the same.** Right now, the Republican establishment and the worst corporations are lining his campaign with millions of dollars. _They want to spend us out of this race._

**So I’m counting on my people-driven surge of support to power my campaign and help us meet our End of Quarter goal.**

| | Derek, we’re so doggone close!

Our midnight deadline is in just a few hours, and **we just need to raise around $14,300 more to reach our goal of raising $300,000 during the first weekend of early voting in Virginia.**

_**[We’ve got a historic grassroots team, so I just need each everyone to chip in $15 — can I count on you, Derek?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36064809/307031569/-2023814932?refcode=20210919.7_TM_9DW&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmUyOTgxMy1hZTE5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w3wIpBxGdHcxJkkQPnYDvzF79rbjzRDs9e0pSfAATxs=)**_

Look, this is a _dangerously_ close race. And now that my opponent is cutting his campaign huge checks, he has endless resources to pull ahead.

Hitting this goal is critical because it’s our shot to get the momentum back on our side.

body:

clean_body: Florida is one of the states most likely to determine Senate control | | | Florida is one of the states most likely to determine Senate control, Derek, but I'm still falling $22,532 short of my $300,000 fundraising goal. This is the worst time for me to fall short of my can’t-miss goal. Between the Senate Republican campaign arm and Marco Rubio himself, the GOP has hauled in more than $32 million to flip the Senate for Mitch McConnell. So even though The Cook Political Report increased my chances of winning, I have a steep mountain to climb to catch up to their fundraising. Since this grassroots team is so strong, I know that if we muster our willpower and dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. And right now, digging deep means hitting these grassroots fundraising goals today and all the way to Election Day. Thank you, Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?JD=20Action=20Team?=
subject: Add your name: Demand answers from Big Oil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
** Justice Democrats
------------------------------------------------------------

Peter,

Fossil fuel companies have known about the threat of climate change for DECADES. Over the course of nearly forty years, these companies spent millions and millions and millions of dollars to spread disinformation about the dangers of fossil fuels.

That’s why we want fossil fuel executives from companies like ExxonMobil to testify before Congress. We need it on the record, in front of the entire country, what these companies knew, when they knew it, and how they’ve stopped action to protect the environment.

Sign on today to our call for a Congressional hearing where Big Oil CEOs have to go on the record. We need subpoenas for these fossil fuel companies to uncover their decades of hiding the truth. (https://actionnetwork.org/forms/demand-answers-from-big-oil?source=partner-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-exxon-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20210919-mc)

Add Your Name » (https://actionnetwork.org/forms/demand-answers-from-big-oil?source=partner-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-exxon-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20210919-mc)

Not only does our movement need to demand accountability from the world’s most powerful fossil fuel companies, which have resisted Congressional oversight in the past, we also need to show the fossil fuel industry — and the politicians they’re lobbying — that we won’t allow their multi-billion dollar federal handouts to stand. Not when the climate crisis is already exacting catastrophic damage across the country.

Let’s get Big Oil companies on the record. Add your name to support holding a hearing where fossil fuel executives must tell the truth! (https://actionnetwork.org/forms/demand-answers-from-big-oil?source=partner-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-exxon-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20210919-mc)

Add Your Name » (https://actionnetwork.org/forms/demand-answers-from-big-oil?source=partner-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-exxon-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20210919-mc)

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Donate » (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em-mc-footer)

Paid for by Justice Democrats

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (#) . If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe (https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=23f6e0d673&e=5a4b10d0ec&c=71e221dac6) . Mail us: 10629 Hardin Valley Rd #226, Knoxville, TN 37932.

name: =?utf-8?b?4pqr?= Fauci Under Fire (via info@unitedemocrats.org)
subject: 14 more Democrats needed! (CONDEMN Ron DeSantis)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| We earnestly asked you last week to support Dr. Anthony Fauci. **_Yet we see you haven’t responded yet..._** Now, he is under Republican fire -- as millions of Floridians die, Ron DeSantis is SMEARING Fauci and echoing vaccine misinformation.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Are you still with me in this fight, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I know it’s a Sunday, but I wanted to write you today with a quick update on where things stand in Congress before we’re back in session tomorrow.
#
Peter, I know it’s a Sunday, but I wanted to write you today with a quick update on where things stand in Congress before we’re back in session tomorrow.
**Here’s the deal:** After several rounds of committee hearings and negotiations on the scope of the Build Back Better Act — a $3.5 trillion bill that invests in climate action, health care, paid leave, child care, universal pre-K, housing, and so much more — the House will begin voting again _this week_.
**Here’s the problem:** Corporate America and Big Pharma don’t like that we’re asking them to pay their fair share in taxes to support these bold and transformative investments in working people. They’re working overtime and spending lots of money to stop our momentum — and to stop Medicare expansion and long-overdue climate action.
**I’m no stranger to tough fights****, Peter.** We’ve been here before. But to be blunt — if we fail to meet this moment and deliver on the passage of the Build Back Better Act, we’re letting down the millions of Americans who delivered the House, the Senate, and White House to Democrats.
[**If you’re still with me in the fight to go big and bold on a spending package that fully invests in working people, can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to our campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210919?refcode=em20210919-643&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=643_420207_I9aYmW&akid=643%2E420207%2EI9aYmW)_This fight is far from over — and with your help today, I’m going to continue putting the pressure on my colleagues to come together to get this done:_
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210919?refcode=em20210919-643&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=643_420207_I9aYmW&akid=643%2E420207%2EI9aYmW)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210919-643-footer&t=22&refcode2=643_420207_I9aYmW&akid=643%2E420207%2EI9aYmW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=643%2E420207%2EI9aYmW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=643%2E420207%2EI9aYmW)
